overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character ascending a grand stone staircase toward an ancient Egyptian temple complex at night. The character passes through a monumental gateway with colossal statues, traverses a ceremonial courtyard lined with palm trees and banners, and approaches massive bull statues adorned with flower garlands at the inner sanctuary entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand ceremonial staircase with crenellated walls

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide stone staircase toward the temple entrance, passing torch sconces and palm trees

notable_agents.action: temple guard descending the stairs toward the camera

entered.detail: wide stone steps leading upward to the temple complex
fortified stone wall with battlements lining the left side of the stairs
fortified stone wall with battlements lining the right side of the stairs
tall palm trees growing along the staircase walls
wall-mounted torches providing warm flickering light

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a grand stone staircase flanked by crenellated walls and palm trees. Torch sconces cast warm light against the cool night sky as the character approaches the distant temple gate. A guard descends the stairs on the right, moving against the flow.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple gateway with colossal pharaoh statues

events.description: enters the covered temple gateway from the open staircase
lighting shifts to darker torchlit interior as the character moves deeper into the gateway

agents.ego_description: walking through the massive stone gateway flanked by giant statues and hieroglyphic reliefs

notable_agents.action: armed guard standing at attention beside the gateway entrance
guard holding a spear near the right pillar

entered.detail: monumental stone gateway with large wooden doors and colorful lintel
colossal seated pharaoh statue with crossed arms flanking the entrance
colossal seated pharaoh statue mirroring the left side
stone walls carved with colorful Egyptian hieroglyphics and figures

segments.scene_description: The character enters the covered temple gateway, passing between colossal pharaoh statues. The space narrows to an enclosed corridor with hieroglyphic reliefs on the walls. Guards stand at attention as the character moves from the open stairs into the torchlit interior.

events.description: exits the covered gateway into the open ceremonial courtyard
passing rows of potted palm trees and red hanging banners lining the path

agents.ego_description: proceeding down the central path of the courtyard toward the inner temple sanctuary

notable_agents.action: robed figure walking ahead toward the inner gate with bull statues

entered.detail: open paved courtyard with scattered flower petals on the ground
large palm trees in decorative planters lining the walkway
crimson fabric banners suspended between poles along the path
tall carved stone monuments flanking the processional way
distant temple entrance with massive statues visible beyond the courtyard

segments.scene_description: Exiting the gateway, the character enters a wide ceremonial courtyard lined with potted palms and hanging red banners. The space opens to the night sky as the character follows a robed figure toward a distant inner gate. Stone obelisks and scattered petals decorate the processional path.

scene_state.functional_zone: inner sanctuary approach with massive bull statues

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal the massive scale of the bull statues against the night sky
passing between the two colossal bull statues adorned with flower garlands and candles

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing between the massive bull statues, looking up at their decorated heads

entered.detail: colossal black bull statue with flower garlands and purple cloth decorations
matching colossal bull statue mirroring the left side
colorful floral wreaths draped around the bull statues' necks
lit candles arranged in rows at the base of the statues
final temple entrance visible beyond the bull statues with blue interior lighting

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the inner sanctuary, dominated by two colossal bull statues adorned with flower garlands and purple cloth. The camera tilts up to emphasize their massive scale against the night sky. Passing between the statues lined with candles, the character moves toward the final temple entrance glowing with blue interior light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous ascent from a grand outdoor staircase into the heart of a monumental Egyptian temple complex under a night sky. It begins with the character climbing stone steps flanked by crenellated walls and torch-lit palms, passing a descending guard while moving toward a distant gate. As the character enters the covered gateway, the open air gives way to a narrowing torchlit corridor lined with colossal pharaoh statues and intricate hieroglyphic reliefs. The scene then expands into a wide ceremonial courtyard decorated with red banners and stone obelisks, following a robed figure across a path scattered with petals. Finally, the camera tilts upward to emphasize the massive scale of two flower-adorned bull statues before passing between candle-lined pillars toward a temple entrance glowing with a mysterious blue light.
